metaDescription: Protect your rights with an experienced Burbank felony defense lawyer. Farris Law fights for your future. Contact us for a confidential consultation today.
contentHtml:
Just because you have been charged with a crime doesn’t mean you don’t have options.

Being accused of a felony is a frightening experience, but remember that you have rights and options.

One of your most important choices during this difficult time is selecting the right lawyer to defend your case.

With a Burbank felony defense lawyer from Farris Law Firm, you benefit from proven legal strategies and personalized attention.

Our team of experienced attorneys has a track record of success in navigating the complexities of felony cases and achieving favorable outcomes for our clients.

Schedule a confidential consultation online or at (818) 861-0861 to learn more about your rights and legal options.

Why Choose Our Felony Defense Attorneys in Burbank, CA?

We Add Value to Your Defense

At Farris Law Firm, we won’t intimidate you or pass your case off to an inexperienced associate.

You will work directly with one of our experienced felony defense lawyers, receiving the support and guidance you need throughout every stage of your case.

We believe that communication is vital to building a strong defense, which is why our legal professionals are readily available to answer any questions or concerns you may have. Our goal is to provide you with peace of mind and guide you through this challenging process as smoothly as possible.

The legal team at Farris Law Firm strives to add value to your defense with strategies that see the bigger picture.

Our attorneys will thoroughly investigate the details of your case, analyze all evidence presented by the prosecution, and develop a strategic defense plan tailored to your specific situation.

Your future depends on the outcome of your case, and we are committed to fighting for your rights and protecting your freedom. Contact our criminal defense law firm now to start building a strong defense today.

What Felonies Can Farris Law Firm Help Me With?

Our practice areas cover a wide range of felony offenses, including but not limited to:

  • Shoplifting
  • Break-ins
  • Robbery
  • Burglary
  • Vandalism

These felonies have serious consequences, so you need an experienced and dedicated Burbank felony defense attorney from our firm to work on the case.

What Legal Defenses Will Farris Law Firm Attorneys Use?

Every case is unique and requires a tailored defense strategy. At Farris Law, we have extensive experience in the criminal justice system, which allows us to develop effective legal defenses for our clients.

Legal defenses we may use in felony cases include:

  • Lack of evidence: If there is insufficient evidence to prove your guilt beyond a reasonable doubt, we will argue for lesser, reduced, or dismissed charges.
  • Violation of rights: We will investigate if any of your constitutional rights were violated during the arrest or investigation process, such as illegal search and seizure or denial of the right to counsel.
  • Self-defense: If you acted in self-defense, we will work to prove that your actions were justified and necessary.
  • Mistaken identity: We will gather evidence to show that you were not the person who committed the crime, but rather a case of mistaken identity.

We build a solid defense that challenges the prosecution’s case and raises doubts about your guilt. With our experienced felony defense attorneys in Burbank, you can have peace of mind knowing that your case is in capable hands.

What Are the Consequences of a Felony Conviction in Burbank?

Without the help of our private criminal defense lawyers in Burbank, you may face

serious consequences if you are convicted of a felony offense, including:

  • Lengthy prison sentence
  • Hefty fines
  • Probation or parole
  • Mandatory counseling or community service
  • Loss of certain rights, such as the right to vote or own a firearm

Additionally, having a felony conviction on your record can affect your ability to secure employment, housing, loans, and even impact child custody arrangements.

With so much at stake, you can’t afford to take your felony case lightly. Let our experienced Burbank felony defense lawyers fight for the best possible outcome and protect your future.

Burbank Felony Defense Lawyer FAQs

How much does it cost to hire a felony defense lawyer in Burbank?

The cost of hiring a felony defense lawyer can vary depending on the complexity of your case and the attorney’s experience. Ultimately, no price is too high for protecting your freedom and future. Contact our firm to learn more about our competitive rates and payment options.

How long does it take to resolve a felony case in Burbank?

The timeline for resolution varies depending on the specifics of your case. Our priority is to work efficiently while ensuring we build a strong defense for you. We will keep you informed throughout the process and strive to reach a favorable resolution as quickly as possible.

Can I plead guilty to a lesser charge instead of facing felony charges?

You may plead guilty to a lesser charge in exchange for reduced penalties. However, this decision should not be taken lightly and requires thorough consideration and consultation with an experienced felony defense attorney from our firm.

Why do I need a criminal defense lawyer for a felony case?

Private defense attorneys offer much value in felony cases, from building a strong defense to negotiating with the prosecution and advocating for your rights. Our experienced attorneys at the Farris Law Firm will use our knowledge, experience, and legal network to fight for the best possible outcome in your case.

Facing Serious Charges? Choose a Burbank Felony Defense Attorney From the Farris Law Firm To Represent You

At Farris Law Firm, we know that facing felony charges can frighten anyone. Don’t let the fear consume you—take action and hire an experienced Burbank felony defense lawyer from our firm.

With a track record of helping those accused of felony crimes exercise their rights and preserve their freedoms, you can be sure that your case is in capable hands.

To start building your defense today, contact us for your confidential case evaluation online or by calling (818) 861-0861.
